title: Ravaglioli Launches New KBI Scissor Lift Series for Auto Body Shops
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Feb. 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Ravaglioli, part of Vehicle Service Group (VSG) and Dover (NYSE: DOV), today announced the launch of a new KBI scissor lift series.

title: The Dividend Aristocrats Ranked By Quality Scores

title: Dover Board Elects Michael Manley As New Independent Director
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Feb. 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover (NYSE: DOV) today announced the appointment of Michael Manley, Chief Executive Officer of AutoNation, Inc., to its Board of Directors, effective immediately.
